calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Tracy Christine Schaffer was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court is unable to proceed with the proposed name change without further written information from petitioner. Accordingly, this matter is taken OFF CALENDER.
